---
title: "Raw Events"
author: "Robert Reid"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
theme_set(theme_bw())
```

## Counting up raw events


#### Load data

```{r load data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fn = list.files("raw_events/",pattern = "*.csv",full.names = TRUE)

#tf = read_delim(f[1]) |>
#  mutate (
#    class = factor(event,levels = c("CO-GC","CO-terminal","NCO-GC"))
#  )
#
#sf = tf |> count(class, .drop = FALSE)

bd = map(fn,read_csv) |>
  bind_rows()


table(bd$type)
```
